mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shfe_trade_daily (record_date, product_id, product_name, volume, open_interest, oi_change) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{volume}, #{openInterest}, #{oiChange})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shfe_trade_daily WHERE record_date = #{recordDate} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, volume, open_interest AS openInterest, oi_change AS oiChange FROM shfe_trade_daily WHERE YEAR(record_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(record_date) = #{month} ORDER BY record_date ASC, product_id ASC

SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, volume, open_interest AS openInterest, oi_change AS oiChange FROM shfe_trade_daily WHERE record_date = #{recordDate} ORDER BY product_id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM shfe_trade_daily ORDER BY product_id ASC
